series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Kilowatt Hour Reports, Supporting Schedules & Cross Checks
series_metadata.series_description: Including but not limited to, application for electric distribution company (KWH-1), electric distribution company tax return (KWH-2), electric distribution company schedule of self-assessing purchasers(KWH-2), application for self-assessing purchaser (KWH-3), self-assessing purchaser tax return (KWH-4), authorization to file and/or pay kilowatt hour tax or MCF tax via th internet (KWH-6) and associated documentation & correspondence. Documents may include printouts, reports, supporting documentation contrasting distributor and self assessing purchaser for cross check compliance review.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: end of calendar year in which return was filed or cross check was completed. ; Electronic: end of of calendar year in which return was filed or cross check was completed
